sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: fat is 3.3g. cholesterol, saturated fat, and omega3 are doing most of the work. for dairy, the fat side can either add richness or drag the whole thing down.
sections.subtitleText: fat is 3.3g. cholesterol, saturated fat, and omega3 are doing most of the work. for dairy, the fat side can either add richness or drag the whole thing down.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: carbs is 4.7g. sugar, glycemic index, and starch are doing most of the work. for dairy, the best versions keep the convenience without wrecking the fat profile.
sections.subtitleText: carbs is 4.7g. sugar, glycemic index, and starch are doing most of the work. for dairy, the best versions keep the convenience without wrecking the fat profile.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: protein is 3.5g. bioavailability and amino acid quality are both strong. useful protein can rescue a lot of weaker traits here.
sections.subtitleText: protein is 3.5g. bioavailability and amino acid quality are both strong. useful protein can rescue a lot of weaker traits here.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin b12 at 18% DV, vitamin a at 2% DV stand out most. that is barely moving the needle.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin b12 at 18% DV, vitamin a at 2% DV stand out most. that is barely moving the needle.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: calcium at 12% DV, zinc at 4% DV, magnesium at 3% DV stand out most. useful, but still pretty limited.
sections.subtitleText: calcium at 12% DV, zinc at 4% DV, magnesium at 3% DV stand out most. useful, but still pretty limited.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: pros first. easy protein delivery for normal diets because dairy gets real credit for convenience. clear calcium identity because that is a core category strength. slots into meals very easily because practical versatility matters a lot for dairy.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side. not everyone tolerates dairy well because that is a real use-case limitation. fat quality varies wildly across dairy because some dairy is clean, some really is not. processing changes the category a lot because the label alone does not tell the whole story.

closing.summary: Plain Yogurt has a genuinely strong overall case, especially easy protein delivery for normal diets and clear calcium identity. the downsides are there, but not everyone tolerates dairy well and fat quality varies wildly across dairy do not outweigh the upside. best when the protein payoff or fermentation angle outweighs the fat and sodium tradeoffs.
closing.useCaseNote: Best when the protein payoff or fermentation angle outweighs the fat and sodium tradeoffs.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?

explanation.summary: Proteins are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in A tier.
